segments.text: Hello?
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Hello, I'm calling from Tata AIA Life Insurance, sir.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, tell me.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Am I speaking with Mr. Rajiv Dheerubhai Ji?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Sir, I just wanted to confirm one thing with you. Do you use spectacles?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Spectacles, yes.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Spectacles, okay. Sir, do you use them for distant vision or for near vision?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Distant.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay. Sir, you use spectacles for distant vision.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Sir, do you have any stomach-related problems like gastritis, hyperacidity, or anything like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, I don't have any gas or anything like that. Normally, it might happen occasionally if I eat something by chance, but otherwise, there's no problem.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Is it for distant or near vision, sir?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Distant.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: You don't need spectacles for reading, for near vision, right?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, not at all.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Is this the second time you've called?
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Yes, sir, it's because I needed to confirm a few things with you.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Sir, please stay on the line for two minutes.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Oh, I'm standing on the road. Just tell me.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Sir, just one or two minutes.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Sir, for gas problems, have you ever consulted a doctor?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Sir, do you have problems like acidity?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, sir.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Why do you keep calling repeatedly?
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, sir. Thank you, sir.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay.
segments.speaker: customer
